headline: RTX (RTX) Lands Engine Wins And A $1 Billion Military Support Deal
summary: Pratt & Whitney, an RTX (NYSE:RTX) business, reports new commercial wins as British Airways selects GTF engines for its Airbus A320neo fleet. Jackson Square Aviation chooses Pratt & Whitney GTF engines to power additional A320neo aircraft. Pratt & Whitney Canada secures a US$1b U.S. military engine sustainment contract for long term support. The company completes a successful demonstration test of a largely 3D printed TJ150 engine. These announcements highlight how RTX is tying together...

headline: RTX's Pratt & Whitney Canada awarded $1 billion JPATS sustainment contract
summary: Pratt & Whitney Canada has been awarded a nine-year, $1 billion contract from V2X Inc. to overhaul more than 750 PT6A-68 engines that power the U.S. Joint Primary Aircraft Training System (JPATS) T-6 trainer fleet. Pratt & Whitney is an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business.

headline: RTX's Pratt & Whitney Wins British Airways Engine Deal

headline: British Airways selects RTX's Pratt & Whitney GTF™ engines to power up to 63 Airbus A320neo aircraft
summary: Farnborough International Airshow – Pratt & Whitney, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, announced today that British Airways has selected GTF engines to power 33 firm and 30 option Airbus A320neo aircraft. Pratt & Whitney will also provide maintenance for the engines through a 12-year EngineWise® Comprehensive services agreement, ensuring optimized fleet efficiency and cost of ownership. Deliveries are expected to begin in 2027.

Deliveries are expected to begin in 2027.
